name: Cycle
official_rules_text: At the end of a unit’s Activation, ready each of its exhausted Upgrade Cards with the Cycle keyword that was not used during that Activation. Only using the weapon, keywords, or other card text on the card counts as using that Upgrade Card.
description: At the end of a unit’s Activation, ready each of its exhausted Upgrade Cards with the Cycle keyword that was not used during that Activation. Only using the weapon, keywords, or other card text on the card counts as using that Upgrade Card.
